headline: J.B. Hunt: Higher Fuel Prices In Focus Ahead Of Q1
summary: When J.B. Hunt reports its Q1 in Mid-April, investors will receive an early indication of the extent of the impact of higher fuel prices on the businesses...

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on JB Hunt Transport Servs, Raises Price Target to $232
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains JB Hunt Transport Servs (NASDAQ:JBHT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $222 to $232.
